blocksCertification: Low product density by design: only 3 DISTINCT verified product images are genuinely relevant to a binding how-to (T.16000M, VKB Gladiator SCE, VKB Omni-Throttle), embedded as 6 image instances total (hero + 3-figure shotgrid + 2 gearpicks). This cannot reach an 8-verified-image bar without forcing irrelevant product cards, so it is intentionally left below the certification image threshold.
Virpil Constellation ALPHA (referenced for its lockable twist) has no verified in-house image and is text-only; source a real photo before it can become a body visual.
Two infographics (axis map + twist decision tree) and an optional composite hero are flagged for Codex; visual richness on this how-to should come from those, not from added product cards.
Street prices (T.16000M, VKB Gladiator SCE, VKB Omni-Throttle) are quoted as approximate ('~'); confirm current pricing before any certification.

Star Citizen setup details lean partly on a search snippet because the SC Wiki Guide:Controls returned HTTP 403 on direct fetch; re-verify the advanced-menu label and Strafe bind names against the live wiki.
